lessons.title: Understand the Transformer architecture and explore large language models in Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn about the history of natural language processing (NLP), including how the Transformer architecture revolutionized the field and helped us create large language models (LLMs). Work with LLMs in Azure Machine Learning through the foundation models in the model catalog.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-foundation-models-in-model-catalog/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand the Transformer architecture and explore large language models in Azure Machine Learning

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Work with generative artificial intelligence (AI) models in Azure Machine Learning
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Work with generative artificial intelligence (AI) models in Azure Machine Learning**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
